transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: Hello! Thanks for calling CloudFlow. I’m your AI assistant, here to help with product questions, onboarding, and support — twenty four seven. How can I assist you today?

transcript.speaker: Customer
transcript.text: Hi, I’m evaluating your product and had a few questions.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: Happy to help. Are you currently using CloudFlow, or exploring it for the first time?

transcript.speaker: Customer
transcript.text: I’m exploring it for the first time.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: Great. Are you evaluating this for a startup, a mid size company, or an enterprise?

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: Perfect. Most mid size teams use CloudFlow to automate workflows, integrate CRM and helpdesk tools, and reduce response times.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: Would you like a quick overview, pricing details, or to book a live demo?

transcript.speaker: Customer
transcript.text: I’d like to book a demo.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: Excellent choice. I see demo availability today at five thirty p.m., or tomorrow at eleven a.m. Which works best?

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: Perfect. Your demo is scheduled for tomorrow at eleven a.m.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: You’ll receive a calendar invite, demo link, and a pre demo checklist shortly.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: Would you like me to also share pricing plans or case studies?

transcript.speaker: Customer
transcript.text: Yes, pricing plans would be helpful.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: Absolutely. I’ll send the pricing details to your email right away.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: Is there anything else I can help you with today?

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: You’re very welcome. Thanks for considering CloudFlow. We look forward to speaking with you tomorrow. Have a great day.
